faq.heading: Common Questions
faq.subheading: Straight answers to what you're probably wondering.

questions.question: How is pricing determined?
questions.answer: Plans are based on included minutes, features, and support level. Overages cost $0.50/min. Book a demo and we'll quote your exact setup.

questions.question: How long does setup take?
questions.answer: About 30 minutes of your time for the onboarding call. We handle all technical work and typically go live within ~72 hours after that.

questions.question: What happens if the AI can't handle a call?
questions.answer: It never guesses. If unsure, it transfers the caller to your staff, takes a voicemail, or sends an SMS follow-up. You get an instant notification with full call details.

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: Yes. TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest, role-based access controls. BAA available for healthcare practices. See our Security page for details.

questions.question: Can I keep my existing phone number?
questions.answer: Yes. We set up call forwarding from your current number. Your clients won't notice anything different — calls just get answered faster.

questions.question: Do you record calls?
questions.answer: Recording is optional. When enabled, the AI announces it. Recordings are kept 90 days by default (configurable).

questions.question: What about wrong bookings or misinformation?
questions.answer: The AI only says what you've approved — your services, pricing, FAQs, and booking rules. When uncertain, it escalates to a human. We refine responses weekly.

questions.question: Which integrations are included?
questions.answer: Native: Google Calendar, Outlook, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, SimplePractice. Others via Zapier or n8n. Enterprise plans include custom API integrations.

seo.title: Security & Compliance — Clearway AI
seo.description: How Clearway AI protects your business data. SOC 2 compliant infrastructure, encryption in transit and at rest, Swiss data standards.

sections.title: Data Handling Overview
details: Call metadata: Caller ID, call duration, timestamp
Conversation content: Transcripts and summaries for CRM logging
Booking information: Appointment details synced to your calendar
Data is processed in the US and stored on secure cloud infrastructure.

sections.title: Call Summaries
details: Instant delivery: Summaries sent to your email or CRM within seconds
Retention: Summaries retained for 1 year by default (configurable)
Access: Only your authorized team members can view summaries

sections.title: Security & Access Controls
details: Secure connections: Data is transmitted over encrypted HTTPS connections
Storage protections applied based on your plan and configuration
Manage user access with configurable permissions
Administrative activity history may be available to support oversight

sections.title: Subprocessors & Vendors
details: Telephony & messaging: providers like Twilio (call routing, SMS)
Voice AI: providers like Retell AI (voice/assistant capabilities)
Infrastructure: cloud providers such as AWS or Google Cloud

sections.title: Compliance Considerations
details: Contract options: certain agreements (such as a BAA) may be available on specific plans
Configuration matters: workflows, routing, recording, and retention settings can be configured to support your internal requirements

sections.title: Customer Responsibilities
details: Obtain required notices/consents (e.g., call recording where enabled)
Manage access credentials and team permissions
Configure retention/recording preferences (where permitted)
Secure CRM/calendar integrations and connected accounts
